input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Quick scan March 3 for key details
with open('articles/2026/03/03/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()[:2000]
        kws = ['kharg island', 'airline suspend', 'emirates outlook', 'qatar airways outlook', 'noem replace', 'homan', 'chad wolf', 'trump coalition', 'cartel', 'saudi hit', 'dhahran', 'manama evacuate']
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title or kw in content[:500]:
                print(f'[{kw[:15]}] {(a.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                print(f'  {(a.get(\"content\",\"\") or \"\")[:300]}')
                print()
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -30
